property.description: Detect abnormal surges of UE registration signaling

event.description: InitialUEMessage or UplinkNASTransport with NAS RegistrationRequest
Count registration attempts per UE and gNB within a time window
Check for repeated registration attempts without completion within a bounded time interval

property.if_satisfied: #em_generate_alert("Abnormal UE Registration Surge", current_time, registration_attempts_count, affected_identifiers, triggering_message_types)
